subject: A heavily loaded rhino carrying an enormous pack of crates, goods, and supplies across an arid plains landscape
description: A robust rhinoceros is shown in three-quarter profile, bearing a towering load of wooden crates, ceramic vessels, decorated containers, and miscellaneous trade goods strapped to its back with ropes and rigging. The pack rises well above the rhino's shoulders and is visually cluttered with colorful items. The terrain is dry and dusty — pale grassland with distant low hills under a warm blue and amber sky. The rhino itself is painted with grounded naturalism, hide detailed, expression neutral.
foreground: rhino bearing a towering load of trade goods
background: dry plains with distant hills and warm sky
emotion: dignified perseverance — carrying an enormous burden without complaint
